name: industries-fsc-producer-hierarchy
description: FSC Insurance distribution architecture — multi-tier producer hierarchy (DST/RTF/CRP/Agent), ProducerRelationship vs InsProducerRelationship__c, ProducerPolicyAssignment, ProducerCommission splits, BusinessLicense, DistributorAuthorization, and compliance gate patterns

compliance.notes: Producer records contain NPN (National Producer Number), a regulated individual identifier. BusinessLicense and DistributorAuthorization records are regulatory compliance data. Handle with minimum necessary field access.

boundary: FSC Insurance Policy lifecycle (endorsements, renewals, cancellations) — use industries-fsc-policy-administration
Commission calculation engines and RevShare platforms

changelog.summary: Initial release — full FSC Insurance distribution architecture skill based on SDD/TDD from production implementation. Covers multi-tier producer hierarchy, InsProducerRelationship__c custom object, dual-DST channel patterns, floating agent model, commission splits, licensing, and compliance gate.
